name: AMERICAS CARMART INC
summary: Americas Car-Mart, Inc. is a publicly held automotive retailer focused exclusively on the Integrated Auto Sales and Finance segment of the used car market. Operating through subsidiaries Car-Mart of Arkansas and Colonial Auto Finance, the Company sells older model used vehicles and provides in-house financing to customers with limited credit histories. As of April 30, 2025, it operated 154 dealerships primarily in small cities throughout the South-Central United States.

products.name: Used Vehicle Sales
products.description: Sale of older model used vehicles with average retail price of $19,398 per unit in fiscal 2025.

products.name: In-House Auto Financing
products.description: Installment sales contracts provided to subprime customers, with portfolio weighted average term of 48.3 months.

products.name: Loan Origination System
products.description: Internally developed system used for credit decision-making and enhanced underwriting across dealerships.

products.name: Customer Relationship Management Software
products.description: Used to cultivate and manage customer relationships through digital communication channels.
